dsl_rule.translation_notes: Double Bottom confirmation requires price close above the high between two bottoms (modeled as close > prev_high for confirmation breakout). Higher left volume preference captured via vol_ratio_20 check. Pattern formation detection itself (identifying twin valleys) is not codable in this rule engine and must be handled by preprocessing/pattern detection. Exit condition uses reasonable reversal logic (close below recent low) since AUTHOR_SILENT. 5% stop_loss aligns with stated failure_rate_5pct. 40% average rise captured in backtest target profit expectations rather than hard exit rule.

source_rule_text: Double Bottom pattern: Price must close above the high between the two bottoms for confirmation
